articles.title: Israel's spy chief held talks on Iran war in Washington, Axios reports
articles.summary: Israel's spy chief held talks on Iran war in Washington, Axios reports The head of Israel's Mossad intelligence agency travelled to Washington two weeks ago to discuss the Iran war, in his first visit to the US capital since taking office, Axios reported on Wednesday, citing two unidentified sources with knowledge of the situation.  He met with CIA director John Ratcliffe and White House officials, the report said.

articles.title: Israeli strike kills at least one in Gaza, report says
articles.summary: Israeli strike kills at least one in Gaza, report says An Israeli drone strike killed at least one person and injured several others in the Nuseirat refugee camp in central Gaza, Al Jazeera reported, citing medical sources. The drone reportedly targeted a tent sheltering displaced people inside the camp. More than 73,300 Palestinians have been killed by Israel since 7 October 2023. Of those killings, 1,180 have occurred since a ceasefire between Hamas and Israel took effect in October.

articles.summary: Lebanon, Israel to hold next talks in Italy on 4 August Lebanon and Israel are scheduled to hold their next round of US-brokered talks on 4 August in Italy, a Lebanese official told Reuters on Wednesday.   The two longtime foes have held several face-to-face talks since April, billed as a way to put a permanent end to the war that began on 2 March. articles.title: No meeting set yet between Trump and Netanyahu, Axios reports
articles.summary: No meeting set yet between Trump and Netanyahu, Axios reports Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu's office is discussing with the White House a potential meeting with President Trump in the Oval Office during Netanyahu's trip to the US next week, but no meeting has been set yet, according to Axios. Officially, Netanyahu's trip to the US last week was cancelled due to the postponement of Senator Lindsey Graham's funeral. White House sources denied the existence of any set meetings between Netanyahu and Trump just one day before the announcement of the cancellation last week.

articles.title: Hamas's new leader delivers statement
articles.summary: Hamas's new leader delivers statement Newly elected Hamas leader Khalil al-Hayya has delivered his first statement as the head of the political bureau of the movement. The Gaza-born leader named stopping the bloodshed in Gaza and restoring a dignified life for its people among Hamas's current top priorities. The West Bank was also addressed in Hayya's statement, described as "a responsibility and a trust". Hayya also stressed that achieving national unity is among the Islamic Resistance Movement's priorities, "which is why we extend our hands to everyone," he said.

articles.title: Israel and Lebanon to hold talks in Italy next month
articles.summary: Israel and Lebanon to hold talks in Italy next month A new round of the US-mediated talks between Israel and Lebanon is set to take place in Italy on 4 August, Italy's Foreign Minister Antonio Tajani told the Italian parliament. Tajani's announcement comes after the Lebanese army stated yesterday that Israeli troops opened fire near Lebanese soldiers in one of the pilot zones which were agreed upon in the last round of talks held in Rome.  "This offence would impede the deployment into the pilot zones," the Lebanese army said in the statement.
